method.candidate_definition: positive-attribution features in one 58+83 carry graph
method.screening_estimand: carry target gap delta minus matched no-carry control gap delta
method.primary_success_rule: negative mean paired difference, negative upper endpoint of its bootstrap 95% CI, and negative mean carry-target delta
method.scope: Final-token error-preserving inhibition only; this matches the position used for SAE training and graph construction.

discovery.ranking_rule: Features active on at least 25% of discovery carry targets and with a negative mean carry-target effect are ordered first; within groups, order is ascending discovery paired difference, then target delta, then graph attribution and stable feature ID.
